basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) has officially announced the Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening under Advertisement No. P.Rect./IP/DOAD/2026/28. The detailed notification has been published on the official IIT Kanpur website. Candidates holding an M.Tech., B.Tech., M.Sc., or MCA with 3 years of relevant experience are eligible to submit their online applications on or before 30 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: M. Tech or B. Tech / MSc / MCA + 3 years relevant experience
qualification.details: Project Engineer: M. Tech or B. Tech / MSc / MCA + 3 years relevant experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Project Engineer: M. Tech or B. Tech / MSc / MCA + 3 years relevant experience

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Project Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIT Kanpur Project Engineer positions is 30th July 2026. Candidates are strongly advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Project Engineer post is M. Tech or B. Tech / MSc / MCA, along with a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience in the field.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Engineer post at IIT Kanpur as per the released notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Engineer position will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 31,600 to Rs. 78,400 per month, depending on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for IIT Kanpur Project Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Engineer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Engineer role at IIT Kanpur will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual job. The recruitment is for a Project Engineer position on a contractual basis at IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for the IIT Kanpur Project Engineer recruitment can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a link to the PDF is provided.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Uttar Pradesh apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from all over India are eligible to apply for the Project Engineer position at IIT Kanpur, provided they meet the specified educational and experience criteria.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The official website of the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is https://iitk.ac.in. Candidates can visit this website for more information about the institute and its recruitments.
